overall.description: Gameplay footage from Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine 2 showing a third-person perspective of an Ultramarine exploring a war-torn gothic industrial city. The character transitions from outdoor platforms to indoor corridors, rides an elevator with squadmates, then exits to engage in intense melee and ranged combat against swarming Tyranid aliens amid burning ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial platform with gothic cathedral ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across metal platform toward building entrance, passing dead alien remains

entered.detail: massive gothic stone structure with spires and arches in the background
metal plating with geometric patterns covering the walkway
dark smoke rising from fires in the distance
orange flames visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on an elevated industrial platform with a massive gothic cathedral ruin in the background. Dark smoke and distant fires suggest recent battle damage. The character walks forward across the metal plating toward a building entrance, with dead alien remains visible on the ground.

events.description: enters indoor industrial facility from outdoor platform through large doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through doorway into metal corridor and approaching interactive console

notable_agents.action: fellow Space Marine standing guard near the console

entered.detail: dark metal walls with industrial piping and gothic architectural details
control panel with glowing green interface and candles on top
thick industrial pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow industrial corridor with dark metal walls and visible piping. A fellow Space Marine stands guard near a control console with glowing green interface. The environment shifts from open sky to enclosed artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: squad briefing area with elevator platform

events.description: elevator platform begins ascending while squad looks up at ceiling breach

agents.ego_description: standing on elevator platform with squadmates, looking up at ceiling breach

notable_agents.action: Space Marine with red helmet marking standing alert with weapon ready
Space Marine looking up at the ceiling breach

entered.detail: circular metal platform with intricate grill patterns
large hole in the ceiling with light streaming through
gothic-style wall-mounted candles providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character joins squadmates on a large elevator platform in a semi-covered chamber. The platform begins ascending as the group looks up at a ceiling breach. Gothic candelabras and industrial machinery line the walls, creating a mix of ancient and futuristic aesthetics.

events.description: approaches exit doorway with bright outdoor light visible ahead

agents.ego_description: moving through damaged corridor toward exit with squadmates following

notable_agents.action: squadmate exiting ahead through the doorway

entered.detail: broken ceiling panels revealing structural damage
large doorway with bright light streaming from outside

segments.scene_description: Moving through a damaged corridor with broken ceiling panels, the character approaches a bright exit doorway. Squadmates proceed ahead as the environment transitions from artificial indoor lighting to natural outdoor light.

events.description: engages Tyranid swarm with ranged bolter fire
switches to chainsword melee combat against larger Tyranid warriors
massive Tyranid swarm becomes visible swarming in the sky background

agents.ego_description: fighting off waves of alien creatures using chainsword and bolter, moving dynamically through the arena

notable_agents.action: large Tyranid warrior with scythes attacking the player
squadmate providing covering fire against the swarm

entered.detail: open metal platform with blood stains and battle damage
dense cloud of flying alien creatures swarming overhead
wreckage engulfed in flames emitting thick smoke
destroyed gothic architecture visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: The character exits into a wide-open combat arena engulfed in battle. A massive Tyranid swarm fills the sky while the character engages in intense melee and ranged combat against charging alien warriors. Burning wreckage and gothic ruins surround the platform as squadmates provide supporting fire against the overwhelming alien force.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate industrial exterior through a series of enclosed gothic corridors and finally into a chaotic open-air battlefield. It begins on an elevated metal platform overlooking a ruined cathedral shrouded in dark smoke, moving past alien remains toward a building entrance. As the character enters, the open sky is replaced by the artificial glow of a narrow industrial corridor and green control interfaces before shifting into a semi-covered chamber where the group ascends on a large elevator. The scene then progresses through a damaged hallway with broken ceiling panels, transitioning from dim indoor lighting toward a bright exit doorway. Finally, the camera emerges into a wide-open arena engulfed in fire, where the environment expands into a war-torn landscape filled with burning wreckage and a massive swarm of Tyranids.
